title: Kimura® 8" Pro Bypass Garden Secateurs, Heavy Duty Premium Japanese SK5 Steel Blades, Non-Slip PVC Coated Handles, Lightweight & Ergonomic, Japanese Bypass Pruning Shears
features: [ HIGHLY VERSATILE ] - These professional heavy duty secateurs equip you with all you need to cut through 25mm thick stems with ease. Ideal for all-round pruning on plants, branches, hedges, flowers and more.
[ SHARP & PRECISE ] - The SK5 Steel blades are forged in Japan and heat treated to 60 HRC ensuring long-lasting edge retention. Frequent sharpening is not necessary for these Japanese secateurs.
[ ERGONOMIC DESIGN ] - The aluminium handles are lightweight, ergonomic and coated in Non-Slip PVC for enhanced comfort and control - ideal for people suffering from arthritis or carpal tunnel.
[ MADE TO LAST ] – The secateurs have a tough aluminium construction with anti-rust components and riveted handles guaranteeing a durable product that is sure to stand the test of time.
[ LOW FRICTION ] - PTFE coating help the secateurs glide through plants without sap build-up or rusting, allowing for a smooth pruning.
[ SAFE & RELIABLE ] – The safety lock is quick and easy to operate requiring only a light squeeze to unlock and simple thumb push to lock securely.
[ USABILITY ] – These secateurs are suitable for both right and left handed users, providing a comfortable and efficient grip for everyone.

[ LIFETIME WARRANTY ] - We are so confident in the quality of our secateurs that a lifetime warranty is included in your purchase. If for any reason you are unsatisfied with your purchase, simply contact us and we will make it right.
